DestinyOfSunAndMoonRules.Rule1: Destiny of Sun & Moon is a 6-reel (2 rows in reels 1 and 6, 3 rows in reels 2 and 5, 4 rows in reels 3 and 4) video slot featuring win both ways and win multipliers in both ways.

Rule2.value: The game is played with 20 base bet for %{576} ways, bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
Rule2.comment: Both %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be replaced by the currency symbol, do not translate. Both %{minChip} and %{maxChip} will be replaced by multiplier, do not translate.
Rule2.example: The game is played with 20 base bet for 576 ways, bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.1 to 8.

DestinyOfSunAndMoonRules.Rule3: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
DestinyOfSunAndMoonRules.Rule4: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
DestinyOfSunAndMoonRules.Rule5: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
DestinyOfSunAndMoonRules.Rule6: Wild symbols appears on reels 2, 3, 4 and 5 only.
DestinyOfSunAndMoonRules.Rule7: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.

DestinyOfSunAndMoonFeatures.WinBothWaysExplain1: Winning combinations can be formed from both left-to-right and right-to-left reels.
DestinyOfSunAndMoonFeatures.MultiplierExplain1: At the start of any main game spin, the two win multipliers are x1.
DestinyOfSunAndMoonFeatures.MultiplierExplain2: The win multiplier on the left will multiply the wins from left-to-right winning combinations whereas the win multiplier on the right will multiply the wins from right-to-left winning combinations.
DestinyOfSunAndMoonFeatures.MultiplierExplain3: During any main game spin, whenever 1 or more Sun symbols appear on the reels, the win multiplier on the left will be increased by 1 for each Sun symbol before wins are paid.
DestinyOfSunAndMoonFeatures.MultiplierExplain4: During any main game spin, whenever 1 or more Moon symbols appear on the reels, the win multiplier on the right will be increased by 1 for each Moon symbol before wins are paid.
DestinyOfSunAndMoonFeatures.MultiplierExplain5: If there are both left-to-right and right-to-left winning combinations in a round, both win multipliers will be added together before wins are paid.
DestinyOfSunAndMoonFeatures.FreeSpinExplain1: 3 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 10 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
DestinyOfSunAndMoonFeatures.FreeSpinExplain2: At the start of the Free Spins Feature, the two win multipliers are x2.
DestinyOfSunAndMoonFeatures.FreeSpinExplain3: During any free spin, whenever 1 or more Sun symbols appear on the reels, the win multiplier on the left will be increased by 2 for each Sun symbol before wins are paid.
DestinyOfSunAndMoonFeatures.FreeSpinExplain4: During any free spin, whenever 1 or more Moon symbols appear on the reels, the win multiplier on the right will be increased by 2 for each Moon symbol before wins are paid.

DestinyOfSunAndMoonCommonRule.WinExplain1: Bet ways win if the winning symbols are in succession from the leftmost reel to the right and from the rightmost reel to the left.
DestinyOfSunAndMoonCommonRule.WinExplain2: Total number of winning bet ways for each symbol are calculated by multiplying the number of adjacent winning symbols on each symbol from the leftmost reel to the right and from the rightmost reel to the left.
DestinyOfSunAndMoonCommonRule.WinExplain3: The winning symbol payout is multiplied by the number of winning bet ways.
